**Industry / Service Type**
e.g., "Healthcare staffing agency" or "SaaS monitoring provider"

**Description**
Brief description of the business and why this example is useful for the project.

**osp.md content**
Paste your draft `osp.md` here or submit it as a pull request to `examples/`.
